title: Self Wringing Twist Mop for Floor Cleaning, 145 cm Long Handle Cotton String Mop with Wringer, Washable Microfiber Wet Mops with Scouring Pad for Hardwood, Tile, Bathtub, Kitchen
features: Self Wringing Mechanism: Equipped with the ratchet system, This self wringing mop allows you to effortlessly wring out excess water from the mop head. Eliminates direct contact with dirty water while ensuring optimal moisture control for streak-free floor

Microfiber Floor Mop Head: Crafted with premium microfiber, this wring mop designed for superior dirt pickup and liquid absorption. The microfiber mop head is machine-washable, maintaining performance through repeated use

Ergonomic 145 cm Handle for Effortlessly Cleaning: The 145 cm long handle of this washable mop reduces bending and kneeling, allows you standing upright for comfortably Mopping. No more bending, kneeling or crouching when doing housework

Gentle yet Effective Scrubbing Solution: Dual-texture scrubbing pad combines soft microfiber loops with textured grout lines. Safely removes dried-on stains while protecting delicate surfaces like hardwood and laminate flooring

Suitable for All Floor Type: From delicate hardwood to gritty garage floors, this house mops for floor cleaning is an excellent cleaning tool. Ideal for kitchen spills, bathroom water, or muddy garage floors. Dries streak-free, leaving surfaces sparkling
